roadmap.title: Build progress during the first 25 Trials
roadmap.description: Finish Trials while collecting documents and items, using a RIG, running, crouching, sliding, hiding, and keeping night vision active. These counters overlap heavily with normal progression.

roadmap.title: Item, trap, damage, and throwable cleanup
roadmap.description: Use the required consumables instead of carrying them to extraction; work locked containers, trapped doors, psychosis, damage, and all three throwable behaviors into the same runs.

roadmap.title: Co-op badge farming
roadmap.description: Pair with a cooperative teammate to trade knockdowns and revives, interrupt enemy attacks with kicks, and complete two-person boost and door actions.

roadmap.title: Ten distinct no-damage clears
roadmap.description: Finish ten different Trials or MK-Challenges without losing health. Use familiar routes and defensive RIGs, and track unique credited missions rather than repeating one Trial.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Evidence documents use randomized map spawns, so scan side rooms while completing the first 25 Trials.

steps.text: Search desks, shelves, and other side-room surfaces for evidence documents; pick up each document so it is added to the collection.
If documents are difficult to spot, equip the X-Ray RIG and activate it while searching. Collect 15 total to receive the badge.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: The counter is for unlocking containers, not merely opening unlocked boxes.

steps.text: Collect lockpicks during a Trial, approach a locked container, choose the Unlock prompt, and complete the lockpick timing check.

Key Master gives each lockpick two uses and first-try timing success. A Confidential Room master key also works repeatedly; the Lock Breaker AMP does not advance this badge. Reach 100 unlocked containers.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Equip a RIG before entering Trials and spend its ability whenever it is ready.

steps.text: At the loadout screen, equip any RIG; X-Ray is convenient because it can be activated without arranging an enemy encounter.
During Trials, activate the equipped RIG whenever its cooldown has finished. Continue until the Badges screen reaches 100 uses.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Co-op moves include boosting a reagent onto a tall ledge and breaking a heavily boarded two-person door.

steps.text: In a co-op Trial, stand at a marked boost ledge or two-person boarded door and activate the on-screen co-op prompt.
Wait for the partner to join the action so the boost or door break finishes. Complete 50 such moves across Trials.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Kick opportunities occur when an enemy attacks or executes another reagent, including attacks from hiding spots.

steps.text: Stay near a co-op partner. When an enemy grabs, attacks, or begins executing that partner, approach the attacker and use the on-screen Kick prompt before the sequence ends.
Successfully interrupt 50 enemy attacks this way; deliberate farming is easiest with a partner and a controlled low-threat enemy.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Small and large medicines appear on surfaces, in wall-mounted first-aid boxes, on dead reagents, and in Confidential Rooms.

steps.text: After losing health, pick up a small or large medicine and use its Consume input; simply collecting it does not satisfy the badge.
Favor medicine items over the Heal RIG while pursuing this counter, and repeat until 200 medicines have been consumed.

achievements.description: Revive or help up a friend 50 times.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Revive or help up teammates 50 times.

guide.context: Both helping up a downed teammate and reviving with a syringe advance the same counter.

steps.text: When a teammate is downed, move beside them and hold the on-screen Help Up prompt until they stand; if they are dead, collect a syringe and use the Revive prompt instead.
Repeat either recovery action 50 times. The Medic prescription shortens revives but is optional.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Adrenaline appears in first-aid boxes, on open surfaces, and on dead reagents.

steps.text: Pick up an adrenaline, select it in the inventory, and use it to gain the temporary speed and unlimited-stamina effect.
Consume each one rather than carrying it to the exit; repeat until 50 uses register.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Antidotes can be found on surfaces, on dead reagents, and inside first-aid boxes; full psychosis also highlights a nearby one.

steps.text: Collect an antidote, select it in the inventory, and use it when psychosis has reduced sanity.
Continue consuming antidotes during Trials until the badge counter reaches 100.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Small and large batteries restore the night-vision goggles and commonly appear in technical boxes; Confidential Rooms can contain large batteries.

steps.text: Run the night-vision charge below full, select a battery, and use it to refill the goggles; merely picking up a battery is insufficient.
Keep night vision active to create recharge opportunities and use 100 batteries in total.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Hit enemies in the head with 50 throwables.

guide.context: Bricks and bottles are the standard throwables; stationary, unaware Ex-Pops are the easiest targets.

steps.text: Equip a brick or bottle, aim at an enemy's head, and throw it for a direct head impact.
Repeat direct headshots on 50 enemies. The Recycle AMP can convert used medicine bottles into extra throwables.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Land 100 direct throwable hits on enemies.

guide.context: This badge counts direct impacts from items such as bricks and bottles.

steps.text: Pick up a brick or bottle, aim at an enemy's body, and throw it so the item directly connects.
Collect replacement throwables after each impact and continue until 100 enemy hits have registered; Strong Arm increases the effect but is not required.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Distract enemies 50 times with thrown objects.

guide.context: A distraction is created by noise near an enemy; a direct hit belongs to the separate throwable-hit counters.

steps.text: Throw a bottle or brick onto a floor or wall close enough for an enemy to hear, deliberately missing the enemy's body.
Wait for the enemy to react and investigate the sound, then repeat until 50 distractions have registered; bottles create the louder distraction.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Lockers, barrels, spaces under desks, and map-specific containers count as hiding spots.

steps.text: Approach a valid hiding place and use its on-screen Hide prompt to enter it fully.
Leave the spot and repeat with hiding places encountered during Trials until 100 entries have registered; Hide and Heal or Hide and Breathe adds utility while farming.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: A trapped door can be disarmed only from the side with the removable battery.

steps.text: Inspect doors for a trap before passing through. If the battery is on the far side, hold the Open input to ease the door open and slip around without triggering it.
On the battery side, use the Disarm prompt and remove the battery. Repeat on 50 trapped doors.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Only doors that begin locked count toward this badge.

steps.text: When a door refuses the normal Open input, use the Bash input repeatedly until the lock breaks and the door opens.
The Doors Basher prescription reduces the job to two hits. Break 50 locked doors in this way.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: This is the backbone of the completion route; every finished Trial counts toward 25.

steps.text: Choose any available Trial or MK-Challenge at the Sleep Room terminal, finish its objectives, and reach the shuttle exit.
Repeat until the Badges screen records 25 completed Trials and awards Glutton for Therapy.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: RIG Rechargers are uncommon technical-box and Confidential Room items.

steps.text: Activate the equipped RIG so that it enters cooldown, then collect and use a RIG Recharger to make the ability ready immediately.
Do not save rechargers until extraction; use 50 while a RIG is cooling down to complete the badge.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Use night vision for a cumulative 10 hours.

guide.context: The badge requires 36,000 seconds—10 hours—with night vision switched on.

steps.text: Turn on the night-vision goggles during dark routes and keep them active while battery charge remains.
Use batteries to restore charge; Night Crawler, Battery Charger, and Battery Extension can stretch each charge. Accumulate 36,000 seconds with night vision active.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Survive 10 cumulative minutes in full psychosis.

guide.context: Door, container, and mine traps or the Pusher can reduce sanity to full psychosis; using an antidote ends the state.

steps.text: On a manageable Trial, allow a psychosis source to empty the sanity meter and trigger full psychosis.
Avoid the Skinner Man and postpone the antidote while safe. Accumulate 600 seconds in full psychosis across attempts, then use an antidote when necessary to survive.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: A teammate is needed to restore you repeatedly without ending the Trial.

steps.text: Enter a co-op Trial with a partner, let an enemy remove your remaining health, and wait until your reagent reaches the downed state.
Have the partner use Help Up or a syringe after the enemy moves away. Repeat the down-and-recovery cycle until 50 knockdowns register.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Healing permits more enemy damage to be accumulated safely during one Trial.

steps.text: Carry medicine or equip the Heal RIG, then allow a low-threat enemy to damage you without letting the Trial fail.
Retreat, restore health, and repeat. Accumulate 10,000 health points lost across Trials to receive the badge.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Nearly every useful object found inside a Trial advances this cumulative badge.

steps.text: Pick up medicine, batteries, throwables, lockpicks, and other portable Trial items whenever inventory space permits.
Use, drop, or hand items to teammates to free slots, then keep collecting until the badge counter reaches 1,000.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Unlock the Tier 1 Slide prescription from Emily Barlow at the Pharmacy in the Sleep Room; prescriptions become active when purchased and are not equipped or toggled.

steps.text: In the Sleep Room, visit Emily Barlow at the Pharmacy and purchase the Tier 1 Slide prescription. Enter a Trial, sprint, and press Crouch to begin a slide.
Work a slide into safe running routes until the cumulative sliding timer reaches 120 seconds.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: The required 3,600 seconds equal one hour and accrue across Trials.

steps.text: Hold the Run input while moving through safe routes and between objectives; the Endurance prescription reduces the stamina cost.
Accumulate 3,600 seconds of actual running across sessions to complete the badge.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.

guide.context: Crouched movement and stationary crouching both contribute to the 3,600-second total.

steps.text: Use the Crouch input while searching rooms and moving past enemies; Night Crawler makes crouch-walking faster and improves night-vision battery efficiency.
Remain crouched for a cumulative 3,600 seconds across Trials to earn the badge.

achievements.description: Complete 10 different Trials or MK-Challenges without taking damage.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue alongside the other counters in this stage.
achievements.summary: Finish 10 distinct Trials or MK-Challenges without damage.

guide.context: The current badge requirement is ten different completed Trials or MK-Challenges; repeating one mission does not satisfy the distinct-completion requirement.

steps.text: Select a Trial or MK-Challenge not yet credited for this badge. A fully upgraded Stun or Blind RIG and a familiar low-threat route reduce risk.
Complete every objective and reach extraction without taking health damage from enemies, traps, or the environment.
Repeat the no-damage clear on nine other distinct Trials or MK-Challenges until the badge awards after the tenth unique clear.
